title: panicum rescissum
intro: Panicum rescissum, also known as Switch Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Panicum rescissum include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Panicum rescissum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
